info.title: Events
info.description: The Webinars Plus & Events webhooks allow developers to receive events for [Webinars Plus & Events](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/zoom-events/) features.

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.session_deleted
The **Session Deleted** event is triggered every time a user in your account or your app, deletes a session in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. A Zoom Events host or a co-editor can delete a session.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Session Deleted** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_sessions:write:admin`,`zoom_events_sessions:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:session`,`zoom_events:read:session:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.session_deleted`

event.description: The name of the event. zoom_events.event.session_deleted.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who deleted the session post event publishing.

attendance_type.description: The type of attendee experience for the event.

start_time.description: The start time of the session in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

end_time.description: The end time of the session in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

event.description: The name of the event. zoom_events.event.session_deleted.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who deleted the session post event publishing.

attendance_type.description: The type of attendee experience for the event.

start_time.description: The start time of the session in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

end_time.description: The end time of the session in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.ticket_updated
The **Ticket Updated**  event  is triggered every time a user in your account or your app updates the attendee registration information in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. The host can update a pre-registration for an event by updating registration question answers of a ticket.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Ticket Updated** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_tickets:write:admin`,`zoom_events_tickets:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:ticket`,`zoom_events:read:ticket:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.ticket_updated`

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.ticket_updated

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who created the event.

ticket_id.description: The ticket ID generated from the registration.

ticket_type_id.description: The ticket type ID for which the user registers to.

external_ticket_id.description: A set of unique alphanumeric characters that references the external ticket ID.

ticket_role_type.description:
The ticket role type: 
 * normal The normal ticket 
 * alternative_host The alternative host ticket 
 * panelist The panelist ticket 
 * bind_meeting The bind meeting ticket 
 * speaker The speaker ticket 
 * interpreter The interpreter ticket 
 * sponsor The sponsor ticket 
 * host The host ticket 
 * moderator The moderator ticket 
 * expo_booth_owner The expo booth owner ticket 
 * attendee_without_order The attendee without order ticket 
 * company_zoom_room The company zoom room ticket 
 * moderator_allhost The moderator all host ticket 
 * hub_host The hub host ticket 
 * hub_owner The hub owner ticket ",
 * subscription The subscription ticket "

authentication_method.description:
The event authentication method for the ticket: 
 * zoom_account Zoom account holder  * zoom_account_otp Zoom account holder with OTP  * corporate_idp Corporate IDP  * no_auth No authentication

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.ticket_updated

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who created the event.

ticket_id.description: The ticket ID generated from the registration.

ticket_type_id.description: The ticket type ID for which the user registers to.

external_ticket_id.description: A set of unique alphanumeric characters that references the external ticket ID.

ticket_role_type.description:

 * zoom_account Zoom account holder  * zoom_account_otp Zoom account holder with OTP  * corporate_idp Corporate IDP  * no_auth No authentication

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.event_published
The **Event Published** event is triggered every time a user in your account or your app, publishes an event in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. A Zoom Events host or a co-editor can publish an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Event published** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_basic:write:admin`,`zoom_events_basic:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:event`,`zoom_events:read:event:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.event_published`

event.description: The name of the event. zoom_events.event_published.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who published the event.

hub_id.description: The ID of the event hub.

description.example: This event was created with the OpenAPI

event_type.description:
Event Types: 
 * CONFERENCE - Multi session event 
 * SIMPLE_EVENT - Single session event 
 * RECURRING - Recurring session event

status.description:
The event status: 
 * PUBLISHED - Published event 
 * DRAFT - Draft event 
 * CANCELLED - Cancelled event

attendance_type.description: The type of attendee experience for the event.

start_time.description: The start time of the event in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

end_time.description: The end time of the event in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

# zoom_events.ticket_type_updated
The **TicketType Updated**  event  is triggered every time a user in your account or your app updates ticketType for an event in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. The host can update a ticketType for an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **TicketType Updated** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_ticket_types:write:admin`,`zoom_events_ticket_types:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:list_ticket_types`,`zoom_events:read:list_ticket_types:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.ticket_type_updated`

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.ticket_type_updated

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who updated the ticketType.

ticket_type_id.description: The ticketType ID for which the user registers to.

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.exhibitor_created
The **Exhibitor Created**  event  is triggered every time a user in your account or your app creates exhibitor for an event in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. The host can create an exhibitor for an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Exhibitor Created** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_exhibitors:write:admin`,`zoom_events_exhibitors:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:exhibitor`,`zoom_events:read:exhibitor:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.exhibitor_created`

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.exhibitor_created

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who created the event exhibitor.

is_sponsor.description: Whether the exhibitor is a sponsor.

tier_id.description: The sponsor tier ID for a particular event. This field only applies to a sponsor.

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.exhibitor_created

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who created the event exhibitor.

is_sponsor.description: Whether the exhibitor is a sponsor.

tier_id.description: The sponsor tier ID for a particular event. This field only applies to a sponsor.

# zoom_events.event_cancelled
The **Event Cancelled** event is triggered every time a user in your account or your app, cancels the event in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. A Zoom Events host can cancel the event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Event Cancelled** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_basic:write:admin`,`zoom_events_basic:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:event`,`zoom_events:read:event:admin`

# zoom_events.event_duplicated
The **Event Duplicated** is triggered every time a user in your account or your app, duplicates an existing event in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. A Zoom Events host can duplicate an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Event Duplicated** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_basic:write:admin`,`zoom_events_basic:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:event`,`zoom_events:read:event:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.event_duplicated`

event.description: The name of the event. zoom_events.event_duplicated.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who duplicated the event.

hub_id.description: The ID of the event hub.

source_event_id.description: The ID of the event from which this event was duplicated from.

description.example: This event was created with the OpenAPI

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.session_ended
The **End Session** event is triggered every time a user in your account or your app ends a zoom-events session.

Zoom users with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing zoom-events event sessions. A Zoom Events host can start and end a Zoom Events session.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **End Session** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_sessions:read:admin`,`zoom_events_sessions:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:session`,`zoom_events:read:session:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.session_ended`

event.description: The name of the event.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who ended the session.

start_time.description: The session's start time in UTC.

end_time.description: The date and time when the session ended in UTC.

event.description: The name of the event.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who ended the session.

start_time.description: The session's start time in UTC.

end_time.description: The date and time when the session ended in UTC.

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.vod_registration_created
The **VOD Registration Created**  event  is triggered when someone registers for a video on-demand(VOD) channel  created by one of your app users or account users.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events.  The host can create an on-demand video channel, set up how their attendees will access their channels with registration.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**
    * The **VOD Registration Created** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_vod_registration:read`,`zoom_events_vod_registration:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:vod_registrations`,`zoom_events:read:vod_registrations:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.vod_registration_created`

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.vod_registration_created.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who created the event.

registration_id.description: The registration ID generated from the registration.

registration_date.description: The registrantion date in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ.

authentication_method.description:
The VOD channel authentication method 
 * zoom_account Zoom account holder   * no_auth No authentication* email_opt registration using email OTP verification*

join_link.description: The unique join link for the vod registrant.

zip.description: The registrant's ZIP or postal code.

title.description: The title of the custom question.
title.example: What do you hope to learn from this?

answer.example: Look forward to learning how you come up with new recipes and what other services you offer.

json-example.value:
{
  "event": "zoom_events.vod_registration_created",
  "event_ts": 1626230691572,
  "payload": {
    "account_id": "AAAAAABBBB",
    "object": {
      "channel_id": "djsjgkjhfhk",
      "hub_id": "huCbxjabcdEFGHfp8uQ",
      "host_id": "z8yCxjabcdEFGHfp8uQ",
      "registration_id": "iso9Dllddp39dagjLj9j",
      "email": "email@zoom.us",
      "registration_date": "2025-05-24T22:30:00Z",
      "authentication_method": "no_auth",
      "join_link": "https://events.zoom.us/ejl/xyz",
      "first_name": "Jill",
      "last_name": "Chill",
      "address": "1800 Amphibious Blvd",
      "city": "Mountain View",
      "state": "CA",
      "zip": "94045",
      "country": "US",
      "phone": "5550100",
      "industry": "Food",
      "job_title": "Chef",
      "organization": "ABC Ltd.",
      "organization_size": "150",
      "comments": "Looking forward to the discussion.",
      "custom_questions": [
        {
          "title": "What do you hope to learn from this?",
          "answer": "Look forward to learning how you come up with new recipes and what other services you offer."
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.vod_registration_created.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who created the event.

registration_id.description: The registration ID generated from the registration.

registration_date.description: The registrantion date in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ.

        {
          "title": "What do you hope to learn from this?",
          "answer": "Look forward to learning how you come up with new recipes and what other services you offer."
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.speaker_updated
The **Speaker Updated**  event  is triggered every time a user in your account or your app updates speaker for an event in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. The host can update a speaker for an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Speaker Updated** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_speakers:write:admin`,`zoom_events_speakers:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:speaker`,`zoom_events:read:speaker:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.speaker_updated`

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.speaker_updated

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who updated the event speaker.

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.speaker_updated

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who updated the event speaker.

requestBody.description:
# zoom_events.ticket_deleted
The  **Ticket Deleted**  event is triggered when one of your app users or account users cancels the event registration.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events.  The host can delete a pre-registration for an event or a registrant can cancel their ticket.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Ticket Deleted** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_tickets:write:admin`,`zoom_events_tickets:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:ticket`,`zoom_events:read:ticket:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.ticket_deleted`

event.description: The name of the event. zoom_events.ticket_deleted.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who created the event.

ticket_id.description: The ticket ID generated from the registration.

ticket_type_id.description: The ticket type ID for which the user registers to.

external_ticket_id.description: A set of unique alphanumeric characters that references the external ticket ID.

ticket_role_type.description:
The ticket role type: 
 * normal The normal ticket 
 * alternative_host The alternative host ticket 
 * panelist The panelist ticket 
 * bind_meeting The bind meeting ticket 
 * speaker The speaker ticket 
 * interpreter The interpreter ticket 
 * sponsor The sponsor ticket 
 * host The host ticket 
 * moderator The moderator ticket 
 * expo_booth_owner The expo booth owner ticket 
 * attendee_without_order The attendee without order ticket 
 * pre_registration — The pre-registration ticket 
 * company_zoom_room The company zoom room ticket 
 * moderator_allhost The moderator all host ticket 
 * hub_host The hub host ticket 
 * hub_owner The hub owner ticket 
 * subscription The subscription ticket

authentication_method.description:
The event authentication method for the ticket: 
 * zoom_account Zoom account holder  * zoom_account_otp Zoom account holder with OTP  * corporate_idp Corporate IDP  * no_auth No authentication

# zoom_events.session_updated

The **Session Updated** event is triggered every time a user in your account or your app, updates a session in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. A Zoom Events host or a co-editor can update the session.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Session Updated** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_sessions:write:admin`,`zoom_events_sessions:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:session`,`zoom_events:read:session:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.session_updated`

event.description: The name of the event. zoom_events.event.session_updated.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the event host who updated the session post event publishing.

attendance_type.description: The type of attendee experience for the event.

start_time.description: The start time of the session in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

end_time.description: The end time of the session in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

# zoom_events.event_updated
The **Event Updated** is triggered every time a user in your account or your app, makes changes to the event data in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. A Zoom Events host or a co-editor can update an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Event Updated** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_basic:write:admin`,`zoom_events_basic:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:event`,`zoom_events:read:event:admin`

description.example: This event was created with the OpenAPI

event_type.description:
Event Types: 
 * CONFERENCE - Multi session event 
 * SIMPLE_EVENT - Single session event 
 * RECURRING - Recurring session event

status.description:

 * PUBLISHED - Published event 
 * DRAFT - Draft event 
 * CANCELLED - Cancelled event

end_time.description: The end time of the event in UTC. The format should be yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

# zoom_events.ticket_created
   The **Ticket Created**  event  is triggered when someone registers for an event created by one of your app users or account users.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events.  The host can create an event, set up a registration form, pre-register users or send out a registration email invitation. Users can also register themselves for an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Ticket Created** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.

# zoom_events.exhibitor_deleted
The **Exhibitor Deleted**  event  is triggered every time a user in your account or your app deletes exhibitor for an event in Zoom Events.

Zoom user with a [Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license](https://explore.zoom.us/en/products/event-platform/) have permissions for creating and managing Zoom Events. The host can delete an exhibitor for an event.

## Prerequisites

* Pro or a higher plan with Zoom Webinars Plus or Events license.
* Enable **Event Subscription** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
    * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
    * The **Exhibitor Deleted** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Events** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events_exhibitors:write:admin`,`zoom_events_exhibitors:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_events:read:exhibitor`,`zoom_events:read:exhibitor:admin`

**Event type**: `zoom_events.exhibitor_deleted`

event.description: The name of the event, zoom_events.exhibitor_deleted

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the host who deleted the event exhibitor.

is_sponsor.description: Whether the exhibitor is a sponsor.

tier_id.description: The sponsor tier ID for a particular event. This field only applies to a sponsor.
